title: arisaema tortuosum subsp. sivadasanii
intro: Arisaema tortuosum subsp. sivadasanii is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the genus Arisaema, commonly known as the Cobra Lily. It is a medicinal plant found in the Western Ghats region of India, known for its unique appearance and therapeutic properties. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including improved immune function and reduced inflammation.
